caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark embroidered vest, and a red beaded necklace, stands behind a microphone and plays an acoustic guitar. He is positioned in front of a background of light-colored horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. To the right of the man, a white box contains the black text "ORCA". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone while continuing to play his guitar. His facial expressions shift slightly as he sings, and his hands move minimally on the instrument. The audience members in the foreground remain relatively still. The overall scene remains consistent in lighting and composition throughout the progression.
